meaning: n.[动] 鹪鹩  (英国)皇家海军女子服务队成员 WREN(Women's Royal Naval Service)
examples: In reality the bird was the willow-wren.
I would say we are status quo, "Admiral Wren said."
Unfortunately his latest squeeze, known as Wren, is a video artist.
In the words of the great architect Sir Christopher Wren, "architecture aims at eternity".
Wren uses a separate advertising agency, a unit of BBDO Worldwide, to cater to the automaker.
